title: One App for Tasks, Calendar & Notes, Powered by AI · Routine
excerpt: Routine combines your tasks, calendars and notes into one AI-powered workspace. Plan your day, focus on what matters and get more done
content_html:
Capture everything

Quick capture

Create tasks at the speed of light through a desktop hotkey, enrich them with context and stop switching between apps and services.

AI voice assistant

Delegate remembering or organizing through voice, in particular when you are on the go.

AI meeting notes

Summarize meetings and automatically turn action items into tasks to ensure nothing falls through the cracks.

Works on all platforms, without any meeting bot!

Organize and plan

Time blocking

Block time for your most important tasks to make sure those get done.

Labels, priorities & projects

Categorize your your work with labels, assign priorities and organize everything through projects.

Recurrences

Schedule recurring tasks effortlessly, and never drop the ball anymore.

Finally an app that just works in getting things done. I can focus on my work and not worry about which tool to switch to access my data.

Todoist→ Routine

I used Akiflow before but it was too constraining. Routine is simple at first, but super customizable when you start adapting it to your workflow.

Akiflow→ Routine

We switched to Routine and everything fell into place immediately. We didn't waste hours setting it up like Notion, it's super fast and actually more extensible.

Notion→ Routine

Routine has simply replaced our specialized tools (support, projects etc.) and become our single source of truth and company operating system.

Notion→ Routine

Routine has completely transformed how our team works by bringing all our data together in a single place and automating repetitive tasks.

ClickUp→ Routine

Routine's AI features have change the game for us. We are now automating all our mundane work easily thanks to Routine agents & automations.

Asana→ Routine

Extend as you grow

Databases

Integrate your third-party services to aggregate data into Routine databases and create additional databases to suit your workflows.

Views

Visualize data the way you need to build powerful dashboard, reports and workflows.

Workspaces

Split your organization into logical workspaces to keep data separated and manage access control.

Integrations

Connect all the apps & services you use daily and bidirectionally synchronize your data to centralize all your work in Routine.

content_html_zh:
捕捉一切

快速捕捉

通过桌面热键以光速创建任务，通过上下文丰富任务，并停止在应用程序和服务之间切换。

AI语音助手

通过语音委托记忆或组织，特别是当您在旅途中时。

人工智能会议记录

总结会议并自动将行动项目转化为任务，以确保没有任何遗漏。

适用于所有平台，无需任何会议机器人！

组织和计划

时间封锁

为最重要的任务留出时间，以确保完成这些任务。

标签、优先级和项目

使用标签对您的工作进行分类，分配优先级并通过项目组织一切。

复发

轻松安排重复任务，再也不会失败。

终于有一个可以完成任务的应用程序了。 我可以专注于我的工作，而不必担心切换到哪个工具来访问我的数据。

Todoist→ 例程

我以前用过 Akiflow 但它太受限了。 日常工作一开始很简单，但当您开始将其适应您的工作流程时，它就会变得超级可定制。

Akiflow→ 常规

我们切换到常规，一切都立即就位。 我们没有像 Notion 那样浪费时间来设置它，它速度超级快，而且实际上更具可扩展性。

观念→常规

例行公事只是取代了我们的专业工具（支持、项目等），并成为我们的单一事实来源和公司操作系统。

观念→常规

Routine 通过将所有数据集中到一个位置并自动执行重复任务，彻底改变了我们团队的工作方式。

ClickUp→ 例程

Routine 的人工智能功能改变了我们的游戏规则。 借助常规代理和自动化，我们现在可以轻松实现所有日常工作的自动化。

体式→ 常规

随着你的成长而扩展

数据库

集成您的第三方服务，将数据聚合到常规数据库中，并创建其他数据库来适应您的工作流程。

Views

以构建强大的仪表板、报告和工作流程所需的方式可视化数据。

工作空间

将您的组织划分为多个逻辑工作区，以保持数据分离并管理访问控制。

集成

连接您日常使用的所有应用程序和服务，并双向同步您的数据，以集中您在日常工作中的所有工作。
